scripts.start: npm run build --prefix AI-Testing-Site24x7-Final && npx serve AI-Testing-Site24x7-Final --listen 3333 --no-clipboard
scripts.dev: npm run build --prefix AI-Testing-Site24x7-Final && start cmd /k "npm run proxy --prefix AI-Testing-Site24x7-Final" && npx serve AI-Testing-Site24x7-Final --listen 3333 --no-clipboard
